Blob payloads are preserved as content-addressed references (the blob_id digest plus the origin file id), never materialized into the RDF IR, which must stay value-light for arbitrarily large payloads (e.g. multi-terabyte data dumps). A destination GTS carries the reference; the payload bytes are streamed origin->destination on demand (deferred materialization).
Projection to the canonical RDF-1.2 logic form: non-logic RDF structure is dropped.
Projection to Datalog: non-rule axioms and existentials outside the Datalog fragment are dropped.

Projection to Nemo existential rules: constructs outside the supported rule fragment are dropped.
Projection to OWL 2 DL: rules and constructs outside the decidable DL fragment are dropped; the result is a sound view.
Projection to the OWL 2 EL profile: constructs outside EL are dropped; the result is a sound, PTIME-decidable view.

A predicate's rdfs:range names a value-vocabulary class that conflicts with (or is shadowed by) an explicit sh:class on the same property; the range-derived enum $ref is suppressed in favor of sh:class, and the conflict is recorded rather than silently dropped.

A shape targeted only via SHACL-AF sh:target/sh:SPARQLTarget (an arbitrary SPARQL SELECT, not a class extension) has no closed-world JSON Schema equivalent; the shape is excluded from the compiled $defs.
A SHACL-AF sh:expression node-expression constraint has no JSON Schema equivalent and is dropped.

A sh:not negation whose inner shape is not losslessly expressible as a JSON Schema negation (or that appears at property/value position, where negating a base value schema would be vacuous) is dropped rather than emitted unsoundly.
A SHACL-SPARQL constraint (sh:sparql) has no closed-world JSON Schema equivalent and is dropped.
A value-vocabulary class projected to an enum $def has no seeded named-individual members to enumerate; the $def is emitted with an empty enum and the omission is recorded.
A value-vocabulary class's member is identified by a blank node rather than a named individual, so it has no stable CURIE to enumerate; the member is dropped from the projected enum.
